dcterms:dc.dc:title: SYNTHESEAS: Datasets supporting the provisioning Ecosystem Service Value Chain of Wild caught fish, non-edible fish and farmed fish biomass for Wet Tropics, Cape York and Fitzroy NRM regions
dcterms:dc.dc:creator: Anthea Coggan
dcterms:dc.dc:subject: Sociology of culture
Socio-economic development
Cultural geography
Economic geography
Political economy and social change
Other human society not elsewhere classified
dcterms:dc.dc:description: The SEABORNE (Sustainable UsE And Benefits fOR mariNE) has consolidated and synthesised existing information about who is using the Reef, how it is being used and what the benefits are from this use. This dataset pertains to provisioning ecosystem service - wild fish and non-edible fish and farmed fish biomass and provides values for various fishery types, biomass (kg) and other economic values.
